html: Gemma 12B? It's unique in the Gemma family, and unique among vision models. It's a novel encoder-less model...the whole model is vision. Somehow. I don't understand it, but it blows away Gemma 4 31B and Qwen 27B in my tests. It's not even close. And, is also tiny and fast, compared to those larger models, so it's better and faster and smaller. Weird combo.
